notes: These ranges are coarse allocator policy for World Master-owned content slots.
They are not the exact-claim ledger; use data/specs/custom_id_registry.json for claimed custom ids and spell-shell subranges.
The same numeric band may be reused across different namespaces such as quest and item because namespace + id is the real uniqueness boundary.

quest.purpose: WM private quest arcs, branch quests, follow-up quests, and repeatable bounty slots

item.purpose: WM private reward items, equipped-gate items, and item prototypes

spell.purpose: WM managed spell publish and rollback slots; shell-bank ids are tracked separately in custom_id_registry.json

gossip_menu.purpose: WM-authored conversation nodes and branching menus
